constructor.details: Reverts if the provided RoleManager address is zero.

executeRecoverFunds(bytes32,address,addr.details: Only callable by the Vault. Reverts if the action is not proposed, timelock is not expired, or parameters mismatch. Deletes the action from pendingRecoverFunds.

params.actionId: Unique identifier of the proposed action.
params.recipient: Address to receive the recovered funds.
params.token: Address of the token to recover.

returns._0: True if the action is successfully validated and marked for execution.

executeSetWalletRouter(bytes32,address).details: Only callable by the Vault. Reverts if the action is not proposed, timelock is not expired, or WalletRouter address mismatches. Deletes the action from pendingVault.

params.actionId: Unique identifier of the proposed action.

returns._0: True if the action is successfully validated and marked for execution.

executeSweepDust(bytes32,address,address.details: Only callable by the Vault. Reverts if the action is not proposed, timelock is not expired, or parameters mismatch. Deletes the action from pendingSweepDust.

params.actionId: Unique identifier of the proposed action.
params.to: Address to receive the swept tokens.
params.token: Address of the token to sweep.

returns._0: True if the action is successfully validated and marked for execution.

proposeRecoverFunds(address,address,uint.details: Only callable by the Vault. Reverts if the action is already proposed. Emits RecoverFundsPropose event.

params.recipient: Address to receive the recovered funds.
params.token: Address of the token to recover.

proposeSetWalletRouter(address,bytes32).details: Only callable by the Vault. Reverts if the action is already proposed. Emits SetWalletRouterPropose event.

proposeSweepDust(address,address,uint256.details: Only callable by the Vault. Reverts if the action is already proposed. Emits SweepDustPropose event.

params.to: Address to receive the swept tokens.
params.token: Address of the token to sweep.

setTimelock(uint256).details: Only callable by ROUTER_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if daysCount is zero. Emits TimelockDelayChanged event.

params.daysCount: Number of days for the new delay.

setVault(address).details: Only callable by ROUTER_ADMIN_ROLE. Reverts if the Vault address is zero. Emits VaultSet event.

params._vault: Address of the new Vault contract.

MIN_TIMELOCK_DELAY().notice: Minimum timelock delay for actions (default: 24 hours).

constructor.notice: Initializes the contract with a RoleManager address.

executeRecoverFunds(bytes32,address,addr.notice: Executes a proposed fund recovery action after timelock validation.

executeSetWalletRouter(bytes32,address).notice: Executes a proposed WalletRouter address change after timelock validation.

executeSweepDust(bytes32,address,address.notice: Executes a proposed dust sweep action after timelock validation.

pendingRecoverFunds(bytes32).notice: Mapping of action ID to pending fund recovery action.

pendingSweepDust(bytes32).notice: Mapping of action ID to pending dust sweep action.

pendingVault(bytes32).notice: Mapping of action ID to pending Vault action.

pendingWalletRouter(bytes32).notice: Mapping of action ID to pending WalletRouter action.

proposeRecoverFunds(address,address,uint.notice: Proposes a fund recovery action from the Vault.

proposeSetWalletRouter(address,bytes32).notice: Proposes setting a new WalletRouter address for the Vault.

proposeSweepDust(address,address,uint256.notice: Proposes a dust sweep action for the Vault.

roleManager().notice: Address of the RoleManager contract for access control.
